query:
SELECT 
  id,
  status,
  startedAt,
  completedAt,
  ROUND(durationMs / 60000, 1) as durationMins,
  feedsFetched,
  feedErrors,
  articlesIngested,
  articlesExtracted,
  projectsCreated,
  contactsEnriched,
  apolloCreditsUsed,
  digestSafePromoted,
  contactsPromotedToSendReady
FROM pipelineRuns
ORDER BY startedAt DESC
LIMIT 3;
